rationale: The proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). Elec. Code §253.042 governs campaign finance reimbursement limits for candidates and officeholders. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: A candidate or officeholder who makes political expenditures from the candidate's or officeholder's personal funds may not reimburse those personal funds from political contributions in amounts that in the aggregate exceed the following amounts for each election in which the person's name appears on the ballot:
_note: No conflict; rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
